_meta.description: Baseline Supabase inventory for First Light. Update after migrations or when comparing environments. Not auto-synced — re-run the queries below and paste new results.
migrations_on_record: scripts/syndicate-anonymous-retention.sql — syndicate_anonymous_culls, fl_date_to_season, retain_syndicate_anonymous_culls; replaces aggregate + syndicate_season_summary to merge anonymised tallies
_meta.row_counts_verified: Live supabase-audit-queries.sql (4-table union): cull_entries 5, syndicates 1, syndicate_members 1, syndicate_anonymous_culls 0
_meta.drift_check_verified: scripts/supabase-verify-drift.sql — no rows returned (expected tables, functions, display_name column, cull-photos bucket, RLS on syndicate_anonymous_culls)
_meta.syndicate_manager_breakdown_by_date: Applied: DROP + syndicate-manager-breakdown-by-date.sql; RPC returns per-cull rows with cull_date (diary.js expects cull_date not actual_count)

queries.storage_bucket: SELECT id, name, public, file_size_limit, allowed_mime_types, created_at FROM storage.buckets WHERE id = 'cull-photos';
queries.storage_object_count: SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS object_count FROM storage.objects WHERE bucket_id = 'cull-photos';
queries.storage_objects_sample: SELECT id, name, bucket_id, created_at, metadata FROM storage.objects WHERE bucket_id = 'cull-photos' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 25;

functions_audit_result.args: p_name text, p_allocation_mode text, p_ground_filter text
